options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: x_potion_brewing
options.description:
Determine whether you can brew more than one X potion at a time

One at a time - You can only brew one X potion at a time

Simultaneously - You can brew multiple X potions at a time, provided you have enough resources to brew them all at once.

options.name: enable_computer
options.description: Whether to enable The Computer. Once you have cleared the game, The Computer can be used to cheat items.

options.name: scouting
options.description: Do you want to create hints when you first enter a shop?

options.name: font_traps
options.description: The number of font traps made available in the item pool

options.name: quest_randomisation
options.description:
Determine logic for entrance randomisation

Off - Do not randomise entrances

Quests Only - Randomise every quest

Quests and Rooms Separate - Randomise every quest and every room

Everything - Randomise every quest and room together

options.name: randomise_tower
options.description: Determine whether the tower is affected by your entrance randomisation setting. Does not have any effect if entrance randomisation does not randomise rooms

options.name: randomise_x_potion
options.description: Determine whether the X Potion is affected by your entrance randomisation setting. Does not have any effect if entrance randomisation does not randomise quests

options.name: starting_weapon
options.description:
Select the weapon that you will start the game with.

Progressive Weapons will give you the next weapon in the sequence each time you get it.

options.name: progressive_jump
options.description: Obtain the Pogo Stick, the Desert Bird Feather and the Rocket Boots in that order

options.name: randomise_hp_bar
options.description: Whether the HP Bar must be an item found elsewhere

options.name: grimoires
options.description:
Select how spells will be itemised

Individual Grimoires - The item pool will be filled with Beginner's Grimoire, Advanced Grimoire and Black Magic Grimoire

Progressive Grimoires - The item pool will have three Progressive Grimoires

Individual Spells - The item pool will contain each spell individually. Buying the Beginner's Grimoire will send three checks. Obtaining the other grimoires will send two checks.

options.name: pain_au_chocolat_count
options.description: The number of available Pains au Chocolat.

options.name: candy_production_multiplier
options.description: The number of candies generated per second will be multiplied by this number.

options.name: candy_drop_multiplier
options.description: The number of candies dropped in quests will be multiplied by this number.

options.name: lollipop_production_multiplier
options.description: The number of lollipops generated per second will be multiplied by this number.

options.name: candy_merchant_hat_price
options.description: The price (in thousands of candies) required to buy the Candy Merchant's Hat.

options.name: sorceress_hat_price
options.description: The price (in thousands of lollipops) required to buy the Sorceress' Hat.

options.name: teapot_hp
options.description: The teapot boss's total HP.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: energy_link
options.description: Allow sending energy to other worlds. Candy and lollipops can be converted to energy. 25% of the energy is lost in the transfer.

options.name: gifting
options.description:
Do you want to enable gifting items to and from other Archipelago slots?
Items can only be sent to games that also support gifting

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
